milestone: Five Confirmed Bugs Fixed in One Batch
slice: Fixed five bugs collected without fixing per the standing "keep collecting the bugs for studio but dont fix... we will fix them in one go" instruction, then fixed together on "ok lets fix these bugs first." (1) Fidelity — World Builder's Comic Sans font value was missing the "Chalkboard SE" fallback js/cardDesigner.js's own equivalent already has; fixed in both TEXT_FONT_OPTIONS and TEXT_FONT_CHOICES, applied identically to v1. (2) Fidelity — renderer/slideRenderer.js's _layerDrawDecorationImage never applied layer.rotation (unlike its own shape-kind sibling), so a rotated Image Decoration rendered correctly in Builder's Working View/Runtime Preview but always upright once compiled/Published; fixed with the same rotate-around-center logic already used for shapes, a byte-identical no-op when rotation is unset. A second, independent mismatch in the same code path: the compile step hardcoded decoration.fit to 'fill' (cover) regardless of the Scene Layer's own choice, while engineRuntime.js's own default is 'fit' (contain); fixed in both Builder versions' convergeSceneLayer. (3) Guardrails — a moveable:true legacy decoration (spotlight/paperTexture/shadowWash) silently never moved or resized when dragged, since these three kinds drew against the raw, un-overridden rect regardless of any position/size override, unlike fill/image/shape; fixed by generalizing paperTexture/shadowWash to draw against the position-adjusted rect exactly like fill/image/shape, and having spotlight shift its own anchor-based hotspot by the exact delta the rect moved by (never recentering on the rect's own center outright, which would have silently relocated every existing theme's unmoved glow). (4)/(5) closed by the same change — a size override (SceneEngine.setSize) was read by zero Layer Pack drawing function anywhere; now read by all six decoration kinds, applied first and recentred around the rect's own current center so a position override afterward still lands correctly. A fifth reported issue (World-owned Text edit not repainting the canvas) was investigated via two realistic reproductions and could NOT be reproduced — both the write and redraw paths worked correctly end-to-end; applied only the clearly-warranted defensive fix (js/contextPanel.js's _afterWorldObjectEdit now logs a real console.error on any redraw/refresh failure instead of a silent catch). Verified via both goldenBuild.js suites (30/30 each, unchanged), a new combined Playwright verification script, a real-file Museum Gallery byte-compatibility regression (zero override present, confirmed byte-identical rendering), and a re-run of the existing commitments_test.js. See CLAUDE.md's own entry for the full account.
